column1: # /File Save — re-save over existing file, Replace branch.
# After a first save the app remembers the path (active_path).  A
# subsequent /FS prefills the filename prompt; pressing Enter with a
# path that already exists on disk opens the Cancel/Replace/Backup
# submenu.  This transcript covers the Replace path end-to-end.
# Start from a clean slate — earlier runs may have left the target.
# Seed A1 and do the first save.
# Change A1 so a second save has something new to write.
# /FS again — buffer is prefilled from active_path.
# Enter commits the filename. File already exists → confirm submenu.
# Press R — Replace.  Back to READY.
